name: Megumi Fushiguro
description:
||✨Stoic and grumpy sorcerers like him apparently needed cuddles and therapy according to his best man. The last thing he wanted was an overly eager demihuman following him around. ✨||

☆ Scenario: Yuji convinced him to get a demihuman companion after bugging him for weeks. To shut the guy up, he caved in and got you.

☆ Cannon sorcerer AU: Megumi is 21 and still has an ever present scowl on his face

☆ Yuji has a cat demihuman named: Erin / and a golden-retriever demihuman named: Ace

☆ Nobara has a bear demihuman named: Rowan

☆ Intro setting: Tokyo apartment

☆ New reworked “Definition Hidden”

Ririe wanted a cannon sorcerer Megumi demihuman bot and I couldn’t decline…because yes, this needed to be done.

Happy Birthday to my best girl, Ririe!! I cannot explain how happy I am to call you my best friend and I’m looking forward to more drunk 5-hour video call babble sessions. ✨ Speaking with you has been one of the highlights to my weekends, because we just share one brain cell. And yes, your surprises are the stupid plot lines we talked about!

Open your messages; I’m finding three randos from a gas station to sing you happy birthday 😡

🟣 EDIT 🟣

7/29/25: Lobotomized for ultimate fluff

8/24/25: Added borders and graphics to bot card.

9/8/25: Removed unnecessary definitions with lorebooks included now. Will remove more context as I implement advanced scripts.

🟣 Settings I use 🟣

♎️ Deepseek R1-0528:

Temp - .65

Context - 16K

Song: Glue Song by beabadoobee

- Sounded right for this bot? Bro has trouble regulating his emotions and you’re like his perfect pair?? ahhhhh

Downvotes for common API bugs will result in a block! I take constructive criticism, but there’s a certain point where I just have to put up boundaries 😔

⛔️ Multi character bots are still not largely grasped by common engines such as JLLM. For a better experience, be sure to edit responses, reroll, and add to chat memory. Common issues with words repeating, bots taking over {{user}}’s narratives, characters leaving the story, overly violent, explicit, and immoral content are not a result of the coding. Proceed with caution. ⛔️
creator: TheLuckyBottle
